acceptance_criteria.criterion: get_project_status returns a valid root index object for a test project
get_project_status self-heals incorrect pending_work_packages and total_work_packages counts
get_work_package returns the full WP detail for a valid WP ID
get_work_package returns an MCP error for a non-existent WP
list_work_packages returns all WPs when no filters provided
list_work_packages correctly filters by status and assigned_to
All three tools are accessible when the MCP server starts
Test fixtures are valid against the Zod schemas

summary: Implemented self-healing logic that recomputes counters from actual WP data
Created src/tools/work-package.ts with get_work_package and list_work_packages tools
Implemented filtering by status and assigned_to in list_work_packages
Updated src/index.ts to register all three tools
Verified tools are registered and server starts successfully

comments.note: No observations — read tools implement the specified behavior correctly. The self-healing logic in get_project_status automatically corrects counter drift. Error handling returns MCP-compatible error responses with descriptive messages.

summary: Verified get_project_status returns valid root index object
Confirmed self-healing logic recomputes and corrects pending_work_packages counter
Tested get_work_package returns full WP detail for valid WP ID
Confirmed get_work_package returns MCP error with descriptive message for non-existent WP
Verified list_work_packages returns all WPs when no filters provided
Tested list_work_packages filtering by status and assigned_to
Confirmed all three tools registered and accessible via MCP server
